debug_info.goal:
hyp : ∃ x, ∃ (_ : 4 < x), ∃ x_1, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after x x_1)), x_1.length < 2 * x - 4
m : ℕ
m_is_minimal : ∀ n < m, ¬∃ (_ : 4 < n), ∃ x, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after n x)), x.length < 2 * n - 4
le_m : 4 < m
S : List (Call m)
S_allExp : allExpert (after m S)
S_len_lt : S.length ≤ 2 * m - 5
is_minimal_m : is_minimal m
noHo_S : noHo m S
initPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c) S
midPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true)) S
finalPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) S
this✝¹ : S.length = initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length
this✝ : m / 2 = initPart.length
this : m / 2 = finalPart.length
⊢ m = initPart.length + finalPart.length

rw [this, this✝]
    have m_even : Even m := by
      -- Construct an involution on agents based on their unique initial call partner.
      let partner (k : Fin m) : Fin m :=
        match initial m S k with
        | some c => if c.fst = k then c.snd else c.fst
        | none => k -- Impossible by allExpert
      apply Fintype.card_even_of_involutive_free partner
      · -- Verify partner is fixed-point free (no agent talks to themselves)
        intro k; dsimp [partner]; split
        next c hc =>
          intro h_eq
          -- Self-call implies contradiction with noHo
          have : c.fst = c.snd := by split_ifs at h_eq <;> assumption
          sorry -- Follows from noHo S
        next =>
          -- Isolated agent implies contra
